LAW AND MOTION 301, HEARING RE: DEFENDANT RESTORATION HARDWARE, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. THE SUBJECT MATTER IS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY IS DENIED. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. AN ORDER IS SUBMITTED. MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT RESTORATION HARDWARE, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Aaron Shahmaram, Esq., of Shegerian & Associates, INC., 310.860.0770, for Plaintiff.
